subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call of thy Lord, the Most Glorious, from the realm of divine decree: verily, there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Choosing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندآء ربک الابهی من شطر القضا انه لا اله الا هو العزیز المختار ان
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @suffering and imprisonment
